markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Homebase's conversion funnel and analytics to inform content strategy for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Homebase prioritizes sign-ups (account creation) as the primary conversion metric, with paid conversions as the ultimate goal](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Blog content drives \~0.3% sign-up rate, lower than other site sections](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Amplitude provides granular conversion data by URL, but external access is limited](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [Recent migration to Webflow impacts data consistency before September](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)

## Topics

### Conversion Metrics and Attribution

  - [Primary conversion events:](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
      - [Sign-ups (account creation) - heavily prioritized](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
      - [Paid conversions (paying locations) - North Star metric](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
      - [Contact sales form submissions - secondary focus](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [Attribution model favors last touch, with higher weighting for paid channels](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Full customer journey data available, but not easily accessible](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)

### Analytics Dashboards and Tools

  - [Marketing website dashboard in Looker:](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Segments traffic by funnel stage (ToFu, MoFu, BoFu)](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
      - [Groups by marketing channel and page type](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
      - [Tracks sign-ups, sign-up rate, and web engagement rate](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [Amplitude for granular URL-level conversion data:](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
      - [Can create custom funnels (e.g., blog visit → sign-up flow → conversion)](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
      - [Allows for time-based analysis and CSV export](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)

### Blog Performance Insights

  - [\~500,000 blog visitors in last 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [1.26% entered sign-up flow, 0.3% completed sign-up](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Top converting blog posts include topics like free payroll software and scheduling](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [Blog conversions are lower compared to core site sections](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)

### Potential Content Performance Metrics

  - [Web engagement rate: visitors viewing 2+ pages (3x more likely to convert)](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [Sign-up flow entries: larger sample size than completed sign-ups](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Core page visits from blog: indicator of interest in product pages](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Webflow migration in September affected URL structures and data consistency](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [API access for auto-publishing content to be explored](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Phil to provide:](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
      - [12-month Amplitude report on blog URL conversions](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
      - [Additional metrics on sign-up flow entries and core page visits from blog](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
      - [Screenshot of Looker dashboard filtered for organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [GrowthX to send instructions for Webflow API access for auto-publishing](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [Explore potential for automated, shared analytics pipeline for ongoing tracking](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Consider experimenting with content optimizations based on web engagement rate](https://fathom.video/share/ixtizgRXYZLRBKPoSNPcyEzuVj7CQi7j?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
